notes: Lakes of Bella Terra is a 725-acre master-planned community in Richmond TX developed by Ryko Development, located at Highway 99 and Westpark Tollway. Note: zip 25826 in permit appears to be a data entry error (25826 is a WV zip); likely intended zip is 77406 (Richmond TX). Community includes 1,669 homes. RESERVE suffix suggests a plat phase within the larger community.
